sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30478" key="e)gkurseu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐγκυρσεύω</orth>, <sense id="n30478.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἐγκυρέω</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1415.tlg001:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heraclit.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17</biblScope> </bibl> (s.v.l.).</sense> </entryFree>
